targets.notes: Top priority. src/util.rs. Very high tractability. Informal spec written: specs/limit_size_informal.md. Key props: prefix, nonempty, size-bound, maximality, noop-none.
Top priority. src/config.rs Config::validate. Decidable conjunction of arithmetic constraints. Very high tractability.
src/quorum/majority.rs Configuration::vote_result. High tractability. Majority quorum. aeneas-safe variant exists (#[cfg(feature=aeneas)]).
src/quorum/majority.rs Configuration::committed_index. Medium tractability. Sort-then-index. aeneas-safe variant exists.
src/raft_log.rs RaftLog::find_conflict. High tractability. Scan for first term mismatch.
src/raft_log.rs RaftLog::maybe_append. Medium tractability. Depends on find_conflict.
